title: Migration of tasks from Teamwork to Monday Platform

posts.author: Hammy (Paul Hammock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We are in the throes of transitioning from Teamwork to Monday platform and wondered if there is a migration tool which will import existing tasks in Teamwork to Monday.

Can anyone advise if this has been done before?

Thanks
Paul.

posts.author: adamph (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Paul, sorry to resurect an old thread but did you ever find a solution for this?

posts.author: Hammy (Paul Hammock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Adam,

No we didn’t. We ended up writing our own script to migrate these across ourselves and then use AI to summarise the comments for additional transition information.
